## Definition of Done

- [ ] Linked issue with acceptance criteria (for non-trivial work)
- [ ] Unit or integration test added
- [ ] Error path handled; no silent fallback
- [ ] For semantic features: UI shows confidence/evidence
- [ ] Docs and examples/fixtures updated
- [ ] `lint`, `typecheck`, `test`, `build` pass
